title: papaver somniferum var. album
intro: Papaver somniferum var. album is a rare and white-petaled variety of the opium poppy, a flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region and parts of Asia, known for its delicate and ornamental appearance. The plant contains medicinal properties such as alkaloids like thebaine and codeine, which have analgesic and antitussive effects. The health benefits of Papaver somniferum var. album include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, and its traditional use in treating coughs and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and extracts, but due to its potential for abuse, its cultivation and use are heavily regulated in many countries.
